summary: Wired every not-ready admin nav item to a real ComingSoon route. Created 12 page.tsx files under app/(admin)/admin/ for notifications, all admin_exam items (banks/tryouts/analytics/schedules), all admin_school items (students/classes/reports), and super-admin System items (accounts/schools/config/audit), each rendering the shared ComingSoon component. Added a single parameterized test file (coming-soon-routes.test.tsx) verifying each route renders ComingSoon plus nav-config flag assertions for admin_exam/admin_school/super_admin/system/notifications and that live Content Manager items are not flagged. Nav-config already correctly marks coming-soon items via the cs() helper; no changes needed. Full test suite 104/104 green; npm run build green (all 12 new routes appear in the static route table).
